name: Bread Pudding (Brandywyne Restaurant)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sweet bread, cubed, oven dried
recipeInstructions:
1. The bread is crucial in this recipe. Use un-sliced breakfast pastries or croissants. Cut into large cubes and toast until they resemble croutons.
2. Place the cubed bread in a 8 x 10-inch baking pan, filling it about 2/3 full.
3. Add raisins and shredded coconut to the bread, then toss gently.
4. Drizzle melted butter evenly over the bread mixture.
5. In a separate bowl, beat eggs until well combined. Gradually stir in hot milk, followed by sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and vanilla.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the bread, ensuring it's fully absorbed.
7. Place the baking pan in a larger one filled with hot water to about halfway up the outer rim of the pudding pan (water bath).
8. Bake in an oven preheated to 375°F for 45 minutes to an hour, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Serve warm with whipped cream or chilled as desired.
